name: setChatAdministratorCustomTitle
description: Use this method to set a custom title for an administrator in a supergroup promoted by the bot

parameters.name: chat_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target supergroup in the format @username

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the target user

parameters.name: custom_title
parameters.description: New custom title for the administrator; 0-16 characters, emoji are not allowed
